infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vibe ID needs camera access to capture your selfie and analyze your aesthetic.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Vibe ID needs photo library access to upload an existing photo for analysis.

plugins.photosPermission: Vibe ID needs photo access so you can upload a selfie for analysis.
